nasb.text: And God said to Noah, “This is the sign of the covenant which I have established between Me and all flesh that is on the earth.”

esv.text: God said to Noah, “This is the sign of the covenant that I have established between me and all flesh that is on the earth.”

cnv.text: 神對挪亞說：“這就是我與地上凡有生命的立約的記號。”

ccb.text: 上帝对挪亚说：“彩虹是我与地上一切生灵立约的记号。”

csbs.text: 神对挪亚说：“这就是我与地上一切有血肉的所立之约的标记。”
